description: Same deterministic Markdown tree as IDX-D, enriched with summaries + doc description generated by a LOCAL Ollama model (qwen2.5).
quality_note: Summary-type split matches IDX-C (gpt-4o): 193/258 raw-text echoes vs IDX-C's 194/258, with 0 nodes degraded relative to gpt-4o.
operational_notes: 258 summary calls fired concurrently but Ollama serializes them; this triggered ~10 LiteLLM retries and several 600s timeouts. The final artifact is complete because retries recovered the timed-out calls, but local index generation is operationally slow/fragile under concurrency (rubric E).
